steps.dialogue: Hi! I'm **Shibuya Kanon**. Welcome to the **Love Live! Official Card Game** tutorial!

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.

hand.name: 若菜四季
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!

hand.name: 米女メイ
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
hand.text: [On Enter] You may pay 2 Energy: add 1 Liella! Member card from your Waiting Room to your hand.
hand.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分の控え室から『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚手札に加える。

hand.name: WE WILL!!
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!

hand.name: 嵐 千砂都
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
hand.text: [On Enter] You may put 1 card from your hand into the Waiting Room: put 1 Energy card from your Energy deck into Wait.
hand.text_jp: 手札を1枚控え室に置いてもよい：自分のエネルギーデッキから、エネルギーカードを1枚ウェイト状態で置く。

abilities.prompt: Put 1 card from your hand into the Waiting Room: put 1 Energy card from your Energy deck into Wait?

hand.name: 桜小路きな子
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
hand.text: [Activated] Put this Member from the Stage into the Waiting Room: add 1 Live card from your Waiting Room to your hand.
hand.text_jp: このメンバーをステージから控え室に置く：自分の控え室からライブカードを1枚手札に加える。

hand.name: 若菜四季
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
hand.text: [On Enter] You may pay 1 Energy: look at the top 3 cards of your deck, add 1 to your hand, and put the rest into the Waiting Room.
hand.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分のデッキの上からカードを3枚見る。その中から1枚を手札に加え、残りを控え室に置く。

steps.dialogue: This is a **two-player** card game about **school idols**! You'll recruit **Members** onto your Stage, manage **Energy**, and perform **Lives** to outshine your opponent.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.

steps.dialogue: This game uses three types of cards. **Member** cards, **Live** cards and **Energy** cards. Each player has a **Main Deck** of **60** cards (**48 Member** cards and **12 Live** cards) and an **Energy Deck** of **12 Energy** cards.

steps.dialogue: **Member cards** are the idols that will perform on Stage. Pay **Energy** equal to their cost to play them from your hand. Each Member has a certain amount of colored **Hearts** (upright) that are used when performing lives. There are also **Blades** (the round penlight icons) and **Blade hearts** (The sideways hearts), but we'll focus on the upright heart for now. Shiki here has **1 purple heart**.

steps.dialogue: Here we can see if the cards on your stage meet the heart requirements for this live. **Shiki** only provides **1 purple heart**, meaning we are still missing **1 red heart** and **1 any heart**.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===

steps.dialogue: It may look like we've failed the live, but it isn't over yet... This is where the **Yell** mechanic comes in. Using your cards **Blade** value, Liella will "yell", drawing additional cards from your deck depending on how many total **blades** are active. Shiki provides 2 blades, so 2 cards will be drawn from your deck!

steps.dialogue: Two Natsumi cards have been drawn! Cards drawn with yell contribute the sideways heart in the top-left (**blade hearts**) to your total. The two **red hearts** count for **1 red** and **1 any**. **We can now clear the live!**

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0

μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.

=== Live Show ===

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.

steps.dialogue: **Your Yell** runs first — you flip **3** cards for **3 Blade** on stage. **Ren**, **Keke**, and **Mei** turn up; none of them add **blade hearts** — **Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~** needs **4 red**, **4 purple**, and **3 any**, so that Live **fails**.

waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

steps.dialogue: μ's **Yell** runs next — their first card is **Korekara no Someday** with an **ALL blade heart** (counts as any color, filling what they're missing to clear **START:DASH!!** — here **yellow**). The second card, **Rin**, had no blade heart and added nothing.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0

steps.dialogue: Both Lives resolve — successes stay in storage, failures go to the **Waiting Room**.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.

μ's completed mulligan.

Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.

μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).

μ's — End Main Phase.

Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).

waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

steps.dialogue: I'll now explain another mechanic called **Baton Pass**. By playing a card over another card already on your Stage, you can **swap** the old card with the new one. When Baton Passing, you're treated as having paid the replaced Member's cost by moving them to the **Waiting Room** — you'll only pay the **difference** in Energy.

steps.dialogue: **Mei Yoneme** costs **7** — normally **7 Energy** from hand, but Baton Pass over **Shiki** (cost **4**) on **Right** costs only **3** (7−4). **Shiki** stays on **Center** (**2 Blade**), **Mei** on **Right** adds **1 red** and **2 purple** — you'll set **Mirai wa Kaze no You ni** from **hand** in the **Live Phase**, and Stage is one Heart short of clearing it until **Yell**.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===

μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).

Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).

Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.

waiting_room.name: 唐 可可
waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text: [On Enter] You may pay 1 Energy: look at the top 3 cards of your deck, add 1 to your hand, and put the rest into the Waiting Room.
waiting_room.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分のデッキの上からカードを3枚見る。その中から1枚を手札に加え、残りを控え室に置く。

steps.dialogue: **[On Enter]** — fires once when the Member is played from hand onto your Stage (like Shiki just did). Many say *you may* — they're optional.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 0 | μ's = 1
μ's wins this Live! "START:DASH!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 3 begins ===
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Honoka Kosaka to right area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! used Baton Touch! Cost reduced to 3. (4 Energy under replaced Member carried over.)
Liella! played Mei Yoneme to right area.
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] On Enter:
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] skipped optional On Enter effect.

waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

steps.dialogue: Some **[Activated]** skills only work while the Member is **in the Waiting Room** — the list shows **WR ·** before their name. Stage skills show the slot instead.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 0 | μ's = 1
μ's wins this Live! "START:DASH!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 3 begins ===
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Honoka Kosaka to right area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! used Baton Touch! Cost reduced to 3. (4 Energy under replaced Member carried over.)
Liella! played Mei Yoneme to right area.
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] On Enter:
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] skipped optional On Enter effect.

abilities.prompt: Put 1 card from your hand into the Waiting Room: put 1 Energy card from your Energy deck into Wait?

waiting_room.name: 唐 可可
waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

waiting_room.name: 米女メイ
waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text: [On Enter] You may pay 2 Energy: add 1 Liella! Member card from your Waiting Room to your hand.
waiting_room.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分の控え室から『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚手札に加える。

waiting_room.name: 若菜四季
waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text: [On Enter] You may pay 1 Energy: look at the top 3 cards of your deck, add 1 to your hand, and put the rest into the Waiting Room.
waiting_room.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分のデッキの上からカードを3枚見る。その中から1枚を手札に加え、残りを控え室に置く。

hand.name: 園田海未

hand.text: [On Enter] Look at the top 5 cards of your deck. You may reveal 1 μ's Live card and add it to your hand. Put the rest into the Waiting Room.
hand.text_jp: 自分のデッキの上からカードを5枚見る。その中から『μ's』のライブカードを1枚公開して手札に加えてもよい。残りを控え室に置く。

hand.text: [Live Start] Look at the top 3 cards of your deck. You may put any number of them on top of your deck in any order. Put the rest into the Waiting Room.
hand.text_jp: 自分のデッキの上からカードを3枚見る。その中から好きな枚数を好きな順番でデッキの上に置き、残りを控え室に置く。

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 0 | μ's = 1
μ's wins this Live! "START:DASH!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 3 begins ===
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Honoka Kosaka to right area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! used Baton Touch! Cost reduced to 3. (4 Energy under replaced Member carried over.)
Liella! played Mei Yoneme to right area.
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] On Enter:
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] skipped optional On Enter effect.

(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

steps.dialogue: With **Left** open, set **Mirai wa Kaze no You ni** from **hand** in the **Live Phase**. **Shiki** on **Center** and **Mei** on **Right** supply some Hearts — **Mirai wa Kaze no You ni** still needs some more Hearts, which will hopefully be provided by **Yell**. **Mirai wa Kaze no You ni**'s skill allows **Yell** hearts to count as **any** color, so that improves our chances.

waiting_room.name: 唐 可可
waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
waiting_room.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

waiting_room.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
waiting_room.text: [On Enter] You may pay 1 Energy: look at the top 3 cards of your deck, add 1 to your hand, and put the rest into the Waiting Room.
waiting_room.text_jp: 支払ってもよい：自分のデッキの上からカードを3枚見る。その中から1枚を手札に加え、残りを控え室に置く。

steps.dialogue: Liella ends Main.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 0 | μ's = 1
μ's wins this Live! "START:DASH!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 3 begins ===
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Honoka Kosaka to right area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! used Baton Touch! Cost reduced to 3. (4 Energy under replaced Member carried over.)
Liella! played Mei Yoneme to right area.
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] On Enter:
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] skipped optional On Enter effect.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.

hand.name: 唐 可可
hand.booster_pack: スタートデッキ ラブライブ！スーパースター!!
hand.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
hand.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

hand.text:
[On Enter] You may put 1 Liella! Member card with cost 4 or less from your hand onto your Stage.
(You may enter an area that already has a Member. You cannot enter an area where a Member entered this turn.)
hand.text_jp:
手札からコスト4以下の『Liella!』のメンバーカードを1枚ステージに登場させてもよい。

（この効果で既にメンバーがいるエリアにも登場できる。ただし、このターンにステージに登場したメンバーがいるエリアには登場できない。）

steps.dialogue: μ's sets **START:DASH!!** face-down.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [purple, red, red] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 1 | Hearts: [pink] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 1 | μ's = 0
Liella! wins this Live! "WE WILL!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 2 begins ===
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to right area.
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] On Enter:
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] looked at 3 card(s) (choose).
Liella! — [Shiki Wakana] added 1 card(s) from looked deck to hand.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (5/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Umi Sonoda to left area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
Liella! — [Watashi no Symphony ~Kanon Shibuya Ver.~] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] Live Start:
μ's — [START:DASH!!] looked at top 3 — arrange them.
μ's — [START:DASH!!] arranged 3 looked card(s).
=== Live Show ===
Liella! — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 3 card(s) for Blade.
Liella! performed Live! Blades: 3 | Hearts: [purple, purple, purple] | Live success: 0 | Failed: 1
μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 2 card(s) for Blade.
μ's performed Live! Blades: 2 | Hearts: [pink, purple, pink, yellow] | Live success: 1 | Failed: 0
=== Live Win/Loss Check Phase ===
Live Scores: Liella! = 0 | μ's = 1
μ's wins this Live! "START:DASH!!" added to successes.
=== Turn 3 begins ===
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
μ's — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Honoka Kosaka to right area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (6/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! used Baton Touch! Cost reduced to 3. (4 Energy under replaced Member carried over.)
Liella! played Mei Yoneme to right area.
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] On Enter:
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] optional On Enter (pay Energy).
Liella! — [Mei Yoneme] skipped optional On Enter effect.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.

steps.dialogue: **Live Judge** — your boosted score beats μ's! That's another **Success Live** toward **three** to win the match.

log.msg: Game started! Coin flip decides who goes first.
Preparation: each player drew 6 cards and placed 3 Energy in storage.
🪙 Coin flip: Liella! goes first!
Preparation — Mulligan: you may replace any number of opening hand cards once.
Liella! completed mulligan.
μ's completed mulligan.
Liella! — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.
Liella! — Energy Phase: placed 1 Energy in storage (4/12).
Liella! — Draw Phase.
Liella!'s turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
Liella! played Shiki Wakana to center area.
Liella! — End Main Phase.
μ's — Active Phase: Energy and Members refreshed.

μ's — Draw Phase.
μ's' turn — Main Phase (Active · Energy · Draw complete).
μ's played Rin Hoshizora to center area.
μ's — End Main Phase.
=== LIVE Phase ===
LIVE Phase: place 0–3 cards (Live or Member) face-down in Live storage (draw 1 per card placed), then end LIVE Phase.
Liella! placed 1 card(s) face-down in storage (1/3).
Liella! — locked in LIVE selection (1 card(s) in storage).
μ's placed card(s) in Live storage.
μ's — locked in LIVE selection.
=== Performance Phase ===
Both players reveal Live storage simultaneously.
=== Live Start Effects ===
=== Live Show ===

μ's — Support LIVE (Yell): drew 1 card(s) for Blade.
